title: Unique Wolves
description: An ETF/Optifine resourcepack that adds more wolf textures, aiming for some amount of realism.
body:
Either ETF (Entity Texture Features) or Optifine is required to get more than one texture displayed.

Permissions: Don't reupload the resourcepack as it is. If you modify it or add it to a modpack, make sure to link back to the original Mondrinth page (should be this page).
